Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Show HN: TurboQuant-WASM – Google's vector quantization in the browser 151 upvotes, 6 comments
  2. Rubysyn: Clarifying Ruby's Syntax and Semantics 26 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Ruckus: Racket for iOS 116 upvotes, 9 comments
  4. Show HN: I made open source, zero power PCB hackathon badges 85 upvotes, 9 comments
  5. Nvim-treesitter (13K+ Stars) is Archived 76 upvotes, 9 comments
  6. OpenScreen is an open-source alternative to Screen Studio 221 upvotes, 41 comments
  7. Show HN: A game where you build a GPU 651 upvotes, 147 comments
  8. Breaking Enigma with Index of Coincidence on a Commodore 64 39 upvotes, 4 comments
  9. The Indie Internet Index – submit your favorite sites 132 upvotes, 26 comments
  10. AWS engineer reports PostgreSQL perf halved by Linux 7.0, fix may not be easy 238 upvotes, 57 comments
  11. Training mRNA Language Models Across 25 Species for $165 137 upvotes, 32 comments
  12. Embarrassingly simple self-distillation improves code generation 585 upvotes, 172 comments
  13. Show HN: M. C. Escher spiral in WebGL inspired by 3Blue1Brown 62 upvotes, 12 comments
  14. LLM Wiki – example of an "idea file" 150 upvotes, 41 comments
  15. Introduction to Computer Music (2009) [pdf] 125 upvotes, 33 comments
  16. Zml-smi: universal monitoring tool for GPUs, TPUs and NPUs 23 upvotes, 3 comments
  17. Components of a Coding Agent 221 upvotes, 70 comments
  18. Advice to young people, the lies I tell myself (2024) 88 upvotes, 24 comments
  19. Show HN: Contrapunk – Real-time counterpoint harmony from guitar input, in Rust 50 upvotes, 13 comments
  20. Demonstrating Real Time AV2 Decoding on Consumer Laptops 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  21. Apple approves driver that lets Nvidia eGPUs work with Arm Macs 415 upvotes, 178 comments
  22. Show HN: I built a small app for FSI German Course 21 upvotes, 4 comments
  23. Modern Generic SVGA driver for Windows 3.1 11 upvotes, 1 comments
  24. How many products does Microsoft have named 'Copilot'? 572 upvotes, 284 comments
  25. Show HN: sllm – Split a GPU node with other developers, unlimited tokens 150 upvotes, 74 comments
  26. The CMS is dead, long live the CMS 139 upvotes, 85 comments
  27. German implementation of eIDAS will require an Apple/Google account to function 143 upvotes, 95 comments
  28. The East India Company in Japan 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  29. Electrical transformer manufacturing is throttling the electrified future 75 upvotes, 67 comments
  30. Software never had a soul 3 upvotes, 0 comments
